messages.subject: [R-sig-networks] homophily
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
Does anyone know how to get a measure of homophily for dyads using R?  I 
am not sure if kappa coefficient is the best way to measure homophily in 
this case. Are there better ways to measure it? Any suggestion will be 
welcome.

Thank you in advance.

-- 
Sebasti?n Daza
sebastian.daza at gmail.com
